messages.content: Loaded mind-context, displayed reduced mindmap (session/work/documentation nodes). Fresh session with no active summaries. Greeted user and confirmed K_MIND session active.
User wants to see last session hive in mindmap on start. Two scenarios: continue on same branch or new session from main. Fix session_init to carry forward last session summaries.

Implemented session continuity: session_init.py now saves last session summaries in near_memory.last_session on fresh init. mind-context skill displays them as Last Session Context. CLAUDE.md updated.

summaries.summary: Session start: loaded mind-context, displayed mindmap, greeted user
feat: session continuity — carry forward last session summaries on fresh start for both continue-branch and new-from-main scenarios
